They want state conservation.
They want the east as we'll as the


west to assist us in arid reclama.
ton, but they say the east should
have no part in the conservation of
our natural resources. Conserva-
ton and reclamation are of neces-
sity closely allied to each other,
especially is reclamation depend.
ent on conservation. And the
waters to be used in the reclama-
ton of our arid lands are largely
to be drawn from streams having
their source in other states and it
